title: Arrays
summary: 9618 AS arrays — 1D and 2D, index bounds, iteration, and searching in pseudocode.
learningObjectives: Declare 1D and 2D arrays with appropriate bounds.
Write loops to process array data.
Implement linear search on an array.

simpleExplanation.title: Indexed collections
simpleExplanation.summary: Arrays store multiple values of the same type under one name. Index usually starts at 0 or 1 — check the question convention.
steps: DECLARE Scores[1:10] OF INTEGER — bounds inclusive.
FOR i ← 1 TO 10 — process each element.
2D: Grid[row, col] — nested loops for matrix work.
Linear search: compare each element until found.

sections.content: **Arrays** (10.2) appear in almost every Paper 2 algorithm question. Watch **index bounds** — off-by-one errors fail trace tables.
